text:
There once was a girl named Lucy who loved cats. Every weekend, Lucy went to a sleepy little village where cats were revered. There was Mrs. Flume, the grizzled old cat lady who sat vigil by her garden all winter. There was Whiskers, a purring little brown thing that lived in a hollowed-out trunk.

One day, Lucy read an ancient book about a mystical cat dream. She dreamt she found a magical collar. She wore it one evening. The next day, all the cats came looking for her--cats from miles away!

Lucy was filled with wonder but also fear. She didn't know what to do. Eventually, wise old Mrs. Flume came up to her.

"We cats are drawn to guides," she said. "Perhaps you're that guide."

Lucy hoped so. She took the cats to her place. They spent joyous days exploring. They learned about quiet trees, silent rivers, and how to make their purring
